title: MIN 723 (M+F) Ballast water management: the intra north sea ballast water contingency area
body: "Notice to all Ship Operators and Managers, Charterers, Masters and Officers of Merchant Ships, Skippers of Fishing Vessels, Shipbuilders, Port Authorities, Operators of Fixed and Floating Platforms and Drilling Rigs and Classification Societies.  This MIN expires 17 December 2026. "
